---
title: "Figure 6 – Intersection of PD and metabolic traits"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

Heatmap(magma_trait_matrix)

Heatmap(magma_conditional_matrix)

DotPlot(seurat_obj,
        features=pi3k_genes,
        group.by="condition")

VlnPlot(seurat_obj,
        features=c("INSR","GLP1R"))

ggplot(gwas_df,
       aes(pos, -log10(p))) +
geom_point() +
facet_wrap(~chr)

ggplot(region_df,
       aes(pos, -log10(p))) +
geom_point()

VlnPlot(seurat_obj,
        features="TCF7L2",
        group.by="CellType")

ggplot(go_tcf7l2,
       aes(term, logp,
           size=logp)) +
geom_point() +
coord_flip()

ggplot(pd_gene_df,
       aes(gene, ZSTAT,
           size=ZSTAT)) +
geom_point()
